text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear someone talking rather<n>animatedly from
the training track's<n>stands and head over to
check things<n>out...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I see, I see! I gotta save that<n>move for
later...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow! Look at her run! She's just<n>incredible!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she used her pivot foot to<n>do that?
Ooh, she broke away from<n>the pack so cleanly...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello! Are you here to watch the<n>others as
they train too?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Everyone here really is amazing. It's<n>like,
they're not Tracen students for<n>nothing, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The way that racer accelerates in the<n>final stretch
is so awesome.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The timing of her last spurt was<n>unbelievable too!
I should really ask<n>how she does it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Also, the racer over there has an<n>incredible
amount of stamina!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, she's the one that always<n>eats
mountains of food at lunch. That<n>must be the key,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention Ikuno Dictus over<n>there doing
some solo training.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? I think they're pretty average,<n>actually.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I really don't have any special skills<n>of my own,
so watching everyone<n>closely is the least I can
do.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's why I always get so excited<n>whenever I
discover someone new<n>and amazing.
choice_data_list: You catch on to their styles so fast.
You have a very special power.
You have a very special power.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's why I always get so excited<n>whenever I
discover someone new<n>and amazing.
choice_data_list: You catch on to their styles so fast.
You have a very special power.
You have a very special power.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Aw, you flatterer! Praising me will get<n>you
nowhere, you know!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sides, I know better than anyone else<n>how
average I—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Wait a minute. Why is Ikuno using<n>her legs like
that? That's different<n>than what she usually
does...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Could it be? Is she trying out a new<n>form? Ooh,
what could it be?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but I really gotta find out! Hey,<n>Ikuno!
Heeeey!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser runs off at a<n>speed that can
hardly be considered<n>"average."

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Don't flatter me like that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I really am just a very average<n>Umamusume...
Oh, hold on. Has Ikuno<n>finished training already?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but I want to go over there and<n>help her
out.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She used a lot of equipment, so I'm<n>sure she'll
need a hand putting<n>everything away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I'll actually be of much<n>help, but
cleanup will still be faster<n>with two people than
one.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser helps clean up<n>with way
more than average strength,<n>and the task is done
in the blink of an<n>eye.
